title: CISO/vCISO - Chief Information Security Officer - WFH & Flexible
description:
Job Description & Requirements

We’re looking for an experienced CISO to provide strategic cybersecurity leadership across multiple SME clients. You'll work directly with business leaders to strengthen their security posture and guide them through audits, compliance, and incident readiness. This is an ideal side role if you have bandwidth beyond your day job and it is flexible, high-impact, and well-compensated across multiple projects.

Key Responsibilities

  • Define and lead cybersecurity strategy aligned with business risk and regulatory needs.
  • Act as a trusted advisor to boards and senior leadership on threat posture and data protection.
  • Build and operationalize governance policies, including PDPA, MAS TRM, CSA Cyber Essentials.
  • Oversee incident response, threat detection, and breach management processes.
  • Guide secure cloud adoption, vendor risk reviews, and identity/access controls.
  • Design staff awareness and cyber hygiene programs that reduce human-related risks.
  • Ensure client audit readiness, defensible policies, and demonstrable cyber maturity.

Requirements

  • 10+ years in cybersecurity with leadership experience.
  • Strong experience with PDPA, MAS TRM, ISO 27001, and NIST.
  • CISSP, CISM, or equivalent certifications preferred.
  • Board-level communication and executive presence.
  • Comfortable working with SME clients

Engagement Benefits

  • Lead multiple high-impact projects without full-time commitment
  • Monthly recurring income across client engagements
  • Potential to earn more depending on engagement scope
  • Mostly remote and flexible, work from anywhere
  • Join expert-only C-level events and advisory circles
  • Perfect side role if you have bandwidth beyond your day job

postedCompany.description:
ASLabs is the cybersecurity division of Cybercore Labs, built to protect and empower SMEs and enterprises across the globe. We deliver enterprise-grade cybersecurity solutions with the agility, clarity, and commitment modern organizations need to stay resilient in a rapidly evolving threat landscape.

Our core offerings include:
✔ Identity & Access Management
✔ Data Security & Privacy
✔ Managed Cybersecurity & BAU Operations

We also offer fractional CxO services:

✔ CISO-as-a-Service – Security strategy & compliance leadership

✔ CTO-as-a-Service – Secure technology enablement

✔ CIO-as-a-Service – Business-aligned IT direction


Driven by purpose, ASLabs exists to secure meaningful progress, for businesses and for the world. Through our work, we help organizations build trust, ensure compliance, and scale with confidence.

Powered by Cybercore Labs, our mission extends beyond Cybersecurity as 50% profits purposefully engaged to uplift the undeserved communities. 


Websites: 

https://cybercorelabs.co/

https://ahoseclabs.com/
